channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Guardian’s Kai Wright refuses to buy a new phone
item.description: Kai Wright is the co-host of Stateside with Kai and Carter over at the Guardian. But Wright has been bringing his unique insights to listeners for years. He's also hosted Notes From America, The United States of Anxiety, and Indivisible. He's a Peabody Award-winning journalist who has profiled powerful men, explored what it means to […]

item.title: Trump is threatening a 100% tariff on European goods. Again.
item.description: The Trump Administration is pressuring European nations to drop digital service taxes on American tech companies.

item.title: Claude Mythos 5 is back, but only for a select group of US institutions
item.description: The US government has partially lifted its block on Claude Mythos 5 after two weeks of daily negotiations.

item.title: La preuve vient d’être détectée : autour d'un trou noir, c'est l'espace-temps lui-même qui peut tourbillonner !
item.description: L'héritage d'Einstein est bien vivant, en particulier avec les ondes gravitationnelles et les trous noirs dont on continue à tester les prédictions de diverses façons. Aujourd'hui, pour la première fois avec l'astronomie gravitationnelle, c'est une vieille et fascinante prédiction de la...

item.title: Indie developers got tired of waiting for a new Star Fox, so they’re making their own
item.description: Nostalgia remains a powerful force. So much so that, in exploring the echoes of a late-'90s childhood spent skimming the water of Corneria and sneering "cocky little freaks!" in time with a monkey encased in a Gundam suit, I'm simultaneously describing playing Star Fox 64 (Lylat Wars if you're nasty) in 1997 and streaming it […]

item.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
item.description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

item.title: I've been testing macOS 27 in beta — here's are 3 reasons why it's a bupgrade than you might think
item.description: Based on the time I've spent with it, macOS 27 Golden Gate is an update that's worth looking forward to later in 2026.

item.title: Engadget Indie Pitch: I'M YOUR HOST
Engadget review recap: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+, Sony A7R VI, Ray-Ban Meta Optics and more
item.description: A roundup of recent reviews published by Engadget.

item.title: Sous 40°C, comment réagit un smartphone si on le pousse trop ?
item.description: Trop chaud pour faire quoi que ce soit, à part une expérience bête : faire chauffer le SoC d'un smartphone au max en plein soleil.

item.title: The best Nintendo Switch deals still live after Prime Day: Nintendo Switch 2 Choose Your Game bundle
item.description: Shop the best Prime Day Nintendo Switch deals still live at Amazon, as vetted by our deals experts.

item.title: Sonys newest flagship headphones are still $81.99 off at Amazon
item.description: As of June 27, you can get the Sony WH-1000XM6 for $378 at Amazon, down from $459.99. That's an 18% discount or $81.99 savings.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found the 40+ best Prime Day tech deals still live over the weekend
item.description: Prime Day 2026 is over, but many of the best deals are still live. See last-chance Prime Day tech deals on AirPods, Bose and Sony headphones, and DJI drones.

item.title: Cet écran PC gamer Mini LED 27″ QHD 320 Hz soldé à -26% vous permet de jouer comme un vrai Gentle Mates
item.description: Le TCL 27P2A Pro est un écran PC de 27" qui mise tout sur la fluidité pour des performances dignes de l'eSport, en Soldes à 279,99 euros au lieu de 379,99 euros.

item.title: Why is Apple asking me to pay more for Big Tech’s AI obsession?
item.description: Tim Cook recently said price increases were "unavoidable" and described the company's pricing as "unsustainable." The 16-inch MacBook Pro saw its price go up by $300. The 11-inch iPad Air went from $599 to $749. Even the HomePod Mini got a $30 bump to $129. Cook squarely placed the blame at the feet of the […]

item.title: The differences between Dolby Digital, DTS and Atmos (and which is better)
item.description: How to decide which of these surround sound formats is best for your home theater.
